Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 28 

NC_NVGTN_CASE_TRMNTN_DT 

LABEL: Navigation Case termination date 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation case (NC) termination date. 

LONG NAME: NC_NVGTN_CASE_TRMNTN_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: Format: DDMONYYYY (e.g., 20DEC2020) 

COMMENT: Dates are from October 8, 2018–April 3, 2023 

For each navigation-eligible beneficiary who was eligible
